text: 我记得还有网络上那些男生，比如说什么“我都给我老婆跪下了，我全家父母都跟我老婆跪下了，我老婆即使36岁了，再不生儿子就晚了，她还是不愿意生儿子”
还有哪种男生说什么
反正好多....
可是我完全在怼人的时候想不到对方是“把生孩子当经济决策”之类的思维
我也不知道该怎么纠到这个关键性思维
还有比如一个男生说“我认识一个女生暧昧一个月了她老跟我炫富”后来博主问他“你为什么自卑”他说我31她28，我谈了个比我小三岁的女友她比我有钱我不该自信吗
哇，然后博主就说“怎么就从暧昧对象变女友了”
就是，提出的问题也很厉害
我也不知道为什么光是听对方说一句话就能提出这么厉害的问题
然后顺藤摸瓜就完全把他真实情况就是自卑，和女生暧昧一个多月然后人家比自己有能力
得不到还想诋毁
这些问题全摊开了
我不知道怎么做到的
要是一个男生跟我倾诉说这些
我感觉就很无语，但是我不知道该怎么回说，我要是真无语了，他就开始给我扣帽子了
rawContent: 我感觉就很无语，但是我不知道该怎么回说，我要是真无语了，他就开始给我扣帽子了

text: Your biggest mistake is trying to find logic with people who have none.
translation: 你最大的误区在于 试图去跟不讲逻辑的人找逻辑
rawContent: Your biggest mistake is trying to find logic with people who have none. || 你最大的误区在于 试图去跟不讲逻辑的人找逻辑

text: The guy who said 'don't feel guilty' after you deleted him was just trying to save face and cover up his embarrassment.
translation: 那个被删了还说不用内疚的 只是在掩饰自己的难堪
rawContent: The guy who said 'don't feel guilty' after you deleted him was just trying to save face and cover up his embarrassment. || 那个被删了还说不用内疚的 只是在掩饰自己的难堪

text: As for the ones treating a situationship as a girlfriend, that's pure inferiority and delusion.
translation: 至于那些把暧昧对象当女友的 纯粹是自卑和妄想
rawContent: As for the ones treating a situationship as a girlfriend, that's pure inferiority and delusion. || 至于那些把暧昧对象当女友的 纯粹是自卑和妄想

text: You don't need to learn how to expose them like that blogger did.
translation: 你不需要去学怎么像那个博主一样拆穿他们
rawContent: You don't need to learn how to expose them like that blogger did. || 你不需要去学怎么像那个博主一样拆穿他们

text: You made a very basic mistake
translation: 你犯了一个很基础的错误
rawContent: You made a very basic mistake || 你犯了一个很基础的错误

text: Winning an argument against an idiot brings you absolutely zero benefit.
translation: 赢了一个蠢货并不会给你带来任何收益
rawContent: Winning an argument against an idiot brings you absolutely zero benefit. || 赢了一个蠢货并不会给你带来任何收益

text: You are always thinking within their preset framework
translation: 你总是在顺着他们的预设去思考
rawContent: You are always thinking within their preset framework || 你总是在顺着他们的预设去思考

text: If he wants to put a label on you, let him. Are you really going to care about a fool's evaluation?
translation: 他想扣帽子就让他扣 难道你还要在乎这种人的评价？
rawContent: If he wants to put a label on you, let him. Are you really going to care about a fool's evaluation? || 他想扣帽子就让他扣 难道你还要在乎这种人的评价？

text: Take the first guy for example
translation: 拿第一个男的来说
rawContent: Take the first guy for example || 拿第一个男的来说

text: Handing the power of evaluation to others is the root cause of your frustration.
translation: 把评价权交到别人手里 才是你觉得无奈的根本原因
rawContent: Handing the power of evaluation to others is the root cause of your frustration. || 把评价权交到别人手里 才是你觉得无奈的根本原因

text: He told you not to feel guilty just to force a stance on you that you did something wrong
translation: 他说让你别内疚 就是为了强行给你安一个你做错事了的立场
rawContent: He told you not to feel guilty just to force a stance on you that you did something wrong || 他说让你别内疚 就是为了强行给你安一个你做错事了的立场

text: The moment you started explaining that you weren't guilty, you fell right into his trap
translation: 你去解释你没有内疚的时候 就已经掉进他的陷阱了
rawContent: The moment you started explaining that you weren't guilty, you fell right into his trap || 你去解释你没有内疚的时候 就已经掉进他的陷阱了

text: All you needed to say was
translation: 这种时候你只需要回一句
rawContent: All you needed to say was || 这种时候你只需要回一句

text: What gave you the illusion that I would feel guilty
translation: 是什么给了你我会内疚的错觉
rawContent: What gave you the illusion that I would feel guilty || 是什么给了你我会内疚的错觉

text: As for the blogger you mentioned, it's the same principle
translation: 至于你说的那个博主 也是一样的道理
rawContent: As for the blogger you mentioned, it's the same principle || 至于你说的那个博主 也是一样的道理

text: He didn't get distracted by the showing off wealth part
translation: 他没有被炫富这个情绪点带偏
rawContent: He didn't get distracted by the showing off wealth part || 他没有被炫富这个情绪点带偏

text: He just grabbed the biggest factual loophole in the guy's statement
translation: 只是抓住了那个人话里最大的事实漏洞
rawContent: He just grabbed the biggest factual loophole in the guy's statement || 只是抓住了那个人话里最大的事实漏洞

text: If someone vents nonsense to you and tries to label you
translation: 如果有人跟你倒垃圾还要给你扣帽子
rawContent: If someone vents nonsense to you and tries to label you || 如果有人跟你倒垃圾还要给你扣帽子

text: Don't rush to deny it
translation: 不要急着去否认
rawContent: Don't rush to deny it || 不要急着去否认

text: Just ask him: Which specific thing I did led you to this conclusion?
translation: 直接问他 你是从我的哪件具体行为里得出这个结论的
rawContent: Just ask him: Which specific thing I did led you to this conclusion? || 直接问他 你是从我的哪件具体行为里得出这个结论的

text: Let him provide the proof
translation: 让他自己去举证
rawContent: Let him provide the proof || 让他自己去举证

text: If he can't, he's just throwing a tantrum
translation: 举不出来就是他在无理取闹
rawContent: If he can't, he's just throwing a tantrum || 举不出来就是他在无理取闹

text: 我就是抓不住啊

replyTo.text: He just grabbed the biggest factual loophole in the guy's statement

text: 怎么抓啊
教教我
You can't catch it because your first instinct is always to prove you're right.
translation: 你抓不住 是因为你总急着证明自己没错
rawContent: You can't catch it because your first instinct is always to prove you're right. || 你抓不住 是因为你总急着证明自己没错

text: Next time this happens, just do one thing.
translation: 下次遇到这种情况 你只需要做一件事
rawContent: Next time this happens, just do one thing. || 下次遇到这种情况 你只需要做一件事

text: Stop talking for three seconds.
translation: 先停三秒 什么都别说
rawContent: Stop talking for three seconds. || 先停三秒 什么都别说

text: Swallow the urge to defend yourself.
translation: 把你脑子里那些想解释的话咽回去
rawContent: Swallow the urge to defend yourself. || 把你脑子里那些想解释的话咽回去

text: Then just ask him for the evidence.
translation: 然后直接找他要证据
rawContent: Then just ask him for the evidence. || 然后直接找他要证据

text: Let him do the talking.
translation: 让他自己去圆他的话
rawContent: Let him do the talking. || 让他自己去圆他的话

text: 我感觉你这样说也还好
但是实践起来我不知道怎么用...
感觉你怎么指控我我都挺窝囊废的
